description: RAVI_MD made for people on Earth By RAVINU

SESSION_ID.description: Put your SESSION_ID here. Make sure it starts with king~, malvin~, or star~

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Enter your number here, starting with country code E.g 94768223718

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB URL for persistent storage (recommended for cloud platforms)

DB_URL.description: SQLite path for persistent storage (optional). Example: ./data/baileys.db

TIMEZONE.description: Enter your timezone here. Google or don't edit if you don't know!
